title: ACoolSCHEMA — Canonical 7-Field Object Model
description: Every governed object in the ACoolECOSYSTEM data layer must conform to this shape. Domain-specific fields live in `metadata`.

id.description: Stable unique identifier (e.g. Postgres serial id, cast to string at the API boundary).

entity.description: Owning entity / workspace per the Entity Firewall Protocol.

type.description: Classification / object type, e.g. talent, agency, manager, producer, content.

metadata.description: Domain-specific values. Schema varies by `type`; see metadataSchemas/ for per-type contracts.
